node_data.name: Ricotta Toast — Garden Veg Variation
node_data.short_description: Fiber-rich ricotta toast topped with berries and a touch of honey for a balanced breakfast or snack.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Toast whole-grain bread, spread with ricotta, drizzle with a small amount of honey, and top with fresh berries. Garden Veg Variation: add thin cucumber slices, tomato wedges, or a handful of greens under the ricotta for extra vegetables.
node_data.nutrition_note: Whole-grain bread provides fiber and sustained energy; ricotta adds protein and calcium; berries deliver vitamins and antioxidants; honey contributes natural sweetness. Suitable as a balanced breakfast or snack; for lower sugar, reduce honey portion.
